text: The ambiance is both clinical and creative. As I transition from the sterile hallway into this vibrant, idea-filled room, I feel a sense of awakening. The text on the wall invites me to reflect deeply, and the clash of light and color stirs my curiosity. There is a sense of potential—uncertainty tinged with possibility. I’m drawn to listen, absorb, and let my thoughts roam among these displays of human innovation.
